title: Implement a tree transplanting program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a tree transplanting program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for tree transplantation

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Liaise with local authorities and information services to determine location of services and utilities, local by-laws and regulations governing transplanting and transportation of trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with local authorities and information services to determine location of services and utilities, local by-laws and regulations governing transplanting and transportation of trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with local authorities and information services to determine location of services and utilities, local by-laws and regulations governing transplanting and transportation of trees.

pcs.text: Inspect tree to ensure appropriate transplanting operations are implemented
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect tree to ensure appropriate transplanting operations are implemented?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree to ensure appropriate transplanting operations are implemented.

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery required to implement tree transplanting and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery required to implement tree transplanting and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required to implement tree transplanting and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and use root ball and crown treatments according to requirements of species to ensure tree remains viable throughout transplanting process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and use root ball and crown treatments according to requirements of species to ensure tree remains viable throughout transplanting process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and use root ball and crown treatments according to requirements of species to ensure tree remains viable throughout transplanting process.

pcs.text: Notify local residents and authorities where necessary as part of preparing site for transplanting activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify local residents and authorities where necessary as part of preparing site for transplanting activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify local residents and authorities where necessary as part of preparing site for transplanting activities.

pcs.text: Confirm assets, property and vegetation related to work zone activities are protected, relocated, or secured from potential damage during transplanting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm assets, property and vegetation related to work zone activities are protected, relocated, or secured from potential damage during transplanting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm assets, property and vegetation related to work zone activities are protected, relocated, or secured from potential damage during transplanting.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for tree transplantation

elements.title: Implement transplanting operations

pcs.text: Excavate soil around root zone and undercut root ball with minimum stress to plant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate soil around root zone and undercut root ball with minimum stress to plant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate soil around root zone and undercut root ball with minimum stress to plant.

pcs.text: Prune roots where required to meet the appropriate Australian standard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prune roots where required to meet the appropriate Australian standard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prune roots where required to meet the appropriate Australian standard.

pcs.text: Stabilise tree as root system is undercut and apply anti-transpirants as a root soak or foliar spray to maintain viability of the plant
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stabilise tree as root system is undercut and apply anti-transpirants as a root soak or foliar spray to maintain viability of the plant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stabilise tree as root system is undercut and apply anti-transpirants as a root soak or foliar spray to maintain viability of the plant.

pcs.text: Bind root ball with appropriate material to ensure adequate soil is retained and keep moist prior to transportation and installation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Bind root ball with appropriate material to ensure adequate soil is retained and keep moist prior to transportation and installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Bind root ball with appropriate material to ensure adequate soil is retained and keep moist prior to transportation and installation.

pcs.text: Lift tree and secure for potential storage or transportation using safe lifting techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lift tree and secure for potential storage or transportation using safe lifting techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lift tree and secure for potential storage or transportation using safe lifting techniques.

pcs.text: Prepare and handle tree or shrub to minimise damage during transportation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and handle tree or shrub to minimise damage during transportation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and handle tree or shrub to minimise damage during transportation.

pcs.text: Implement appropriate drainage and soil improvements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement appropriate drainage and soil improvements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement appropriate drainage and soil improvements.

pcs.text: Re-install and stabilise the tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Re-install and stabilise the tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Re-install and stabilise the tree.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement transplanting operations

elements.title: Maintain health and viability of transplanted tree

pcs.text: Apply water to transplanted tree over a sustained period to minimise leaf loss and promote new growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply water to transplanted tree over a sustained period to minimise leaf loss and promote new growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply water to transplanted tree over a sustained period to minimise leaf loss and promote new growth.

pcs.text: Apply anti-transpirants and provide nutritional requirements of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply anti-transpirants and provide nutritional requirements of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply anti-transpirants and provide nutritional requirements of species.

pcs.text: Install tree protection devices to provide adequate support and protection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install tree protection devices to provide adequate support and protection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install tree protection devices to provide adequate support and protection.

pcs.text: Monitor tree condition and site to ensure plant remains healthy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor tree condition and site to ensure plant remains healthy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor tree condition and site to ensure plant remains healthy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain health and viability of transplanted tree

elements.title: Check quality of work and clean-up site

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record completed transplanting program and report to management or the client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record completed transplanting program and report to management or the client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record completed transplanting program and report to management or the client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Check quality of work and clean-up site
